understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character on a tile grid to reach the goal gem tile (+) within the turn budget, avoiding lethal hazards like spikes (u/v) that immediately end the attempt when landed on.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal-only); after the horizontal step, gravity automatically pulls the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (o/m/w), hit a hazard (u/v), or reach the goal (+). CLICK interacts with clickable tiles (notably breakable blocks x), removing the targeted tile at the provided [x, y] coordinate and potentially opening a new fall path; in some cases a click can immediately cause the player to fall if it removes support in the gravity direction. UNDO reverts the previous action, useful to recover from a bad move or click.
